message:
chore(frankenterm-core): minor code quality cleanups

Two small, unrelated cleanups bundled together so they don't clutter
history with single-line commits:

1. distributed.rs — add `impl Default for DistributedHttpClient`

   `DistributedHttpClient::new()` takes no arguments and returns a
   fully-configured client with WebPKI HTTPS roots, so the type
   satisfies the clippy::new_without_default lint. Implementing Default
   is trivial (delegates to new()) and lets call sites that want a
   default client use the idiomatic `DistributedHttpClient::default()`
   or `..Default::default()` update syntax. Behind the `distributed`
   feature gate, matching the existing struct cfg.

2. snapshot_engine.rs — rustfmt expansion of assert!() invocation

   Reformats the single-line `assert!(result.is_some(), "fresh-cx
   shutdown must capture a snapshot")` to multi-line form, matching the
   project's rustfmt output. Pure whitespace change; no semantic
   difference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
